title: ageratina jalpanserra
intro: Ageratina jalpanserra, also known as Jalpan Serra or Mexican Mountain Mint, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ageratina jalpanserra include treating fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Ageratina jalpanserra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
